lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੁਰੈ ਪੇਈਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੰਤ ਕੀ ਵਡਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sasurai peeeai tis kant kee vaddaa jis paravaar |
lines.english: In this world and in the next, the soul-bride belongs to her Husband Lord, who has such a vast family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧ ਕਿਛੁ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aoochaa agam agaadh bodh kichh ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: He is Lofty and Inaccessible. His Wisdom is Unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥ ਦੈਆਲ ਦੇਵ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: deenaa naath daiaal dev patit udhaaranahaar |
lines.english: He is the Patron of the poor, the Merciful, Luminous Lord, the Redeemer of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਸੰਤਾ ਕੀ ਹੋਇ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa saa tis bhaavasee santaa kee hoe chhaar |
lines.english: He has no end or limitation. That service is pleasing to Him, which makes one humble, like the dust of the feet of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦੀ ਰਖਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaadee rakhadaa sach naam karataar |
lines.english: From the very beginning, and throughout the ages, the True Name of the Creator has been our Saving Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੋਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: keemat koe na jaanee ko naahee tolanahaar |
lines.english: No one can know His Value; no one can weigh it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਜਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੰਉ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: din rain ji prabh knau sevade tin kai sad balihaar |2|
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who serve God, day and night. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਿ ਰਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹੀ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man tan antar vas rahe naanak nahee sumaar |
lines.english: He dwells deep within the mind and body. O Nanak, He cannot be measured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਅਰਾਧਨਿ ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: sant araadhan sad sadaa sabhanaa kaa bakhasind |
lines.english: The Saints worship and adore Him forever and ever; He is the Forgiver of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦਿਤੀਨੁ ਜਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd jin saajiaa kar kirapaa diteen jind |
lines.english: He fashioned the soul and the body, and by His Kindness, He bestowed the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਰਾਇਣੋ ਸੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਭਗਵੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis man vasai naraaeino so kaheeai bhagavant |
lines.english: That one, within whose mind the Lord abides, is said to be most fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰੁ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kehan na jaaeeai paramesur beant |
lines.english: His Value cannot be evaluated. The Transcendent Lord is endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee aaraadheeai japeeai niramal mant |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, worship and adore Him, and chant His Pure Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਜਪਿ ਹਰੀ ਦੋਖ ਸਭੇ ਹੀ ਹੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jeevai jap haree dokh sabhe hee hant |
lines.english: Nanak lives by chanting the Lord's Name; all sorrows have been erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰੀਐ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee lochaa pooreeai milai suaamee kant |
lines.english: The soul's desires are fulfilled, upon meeting the Master, our Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸੋ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੰਤੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: din rain jis na visarai so hariaa hovai jant |3|
lines.english: One who does not forget Him, day and night, is continually rejuvenated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੂਰਣੋ ਮੰਞੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab kalaa prabh poorano many nimaanee thaau |
lines.english: God is overflowing with all powers. I have no honor-He is my resting place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੀ ਜਨ ਧੂੜੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee jan dhoorree sang samaau |
lines.english: Grant Your Grace, God, and bless me, that I may merge into the dust of the feet of the humble.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰੇ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਾਂ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ott gahee man andare jap jap jeevaan naau |
lines.english: I have grasped the Support of the Lord within my mind; I live by chanting and meditating on His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਾਇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: audam soee karaae prabh mil saadhoo gun gaau |
lines.english: May I make the effort, O God, to sing Your Glorious Praises in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੂੰ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਰਹਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਿਤਾ ਪੈਨਾ ਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau toon raakheh tiau rahaa teraa ditaa painaa khaau |
lines.english: As You keep me, so do I live. I wear and eat whatever You give me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਕਿਥੈ ਕੂਕਣ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: doojee jaae na sujhee kithai kookan jaau |
lines.english: I can conceive of no other place; where could I go to lodge a complaint?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਬਿਨਾਸਨ ਤਮ ਹਰਣ ਊਚੇ ਅਗਮ ਅਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan binaasan tam haran aooche agam amaau |
lines.english: You are the Dispeller of ignorance, the Destroyer of darkness, O Lofty, Unfathomable and Unapproachable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਹੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: man vichhurriaa har meleeai naanak ehu suaau |
lines.english: Please unite this separated one with Yourself; this is Nanak's yearning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਿਆਣਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਰਸੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਪਾਉ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: sarab kaliaanaa tith din har parasee gur ke paau |4|1|
lines.english: That day shall bring every joy, O Lord, when I take to the Feet of the Guru. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰ ਮਾਝ ਕੀ ਤਥਾ ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਮਲਕ ਮੁਰੀਦ ਤਥਾ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਹੜਾ ਸੋਹੀਆ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: vaar maajh kee tathaa salok mahalaa 1 malak mureed tathaa chandraharraa soheea kee dhunee gaavanee |
lines.english: Vaar In Maajh, And Saloks Of The First Mehl: To Be Sung To The Tune Of "Malik Mureed And Chandrahraa Sohee-Aa"

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਿਵੈ ਘਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਤਿਹ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur daataa gur hivai ghar gur deepak tih loe |
lines.english: The Guru is the Giver; the Guru is the House of ice. The Guru is the Light of the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲੈ ਪਿਆਰਿ ਲਗਾ ਥਣ ਦੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: pahilai piaar lagaa than dudh |
lines.english: First, the baby loves mother's milk;

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਮਾਇ ਬਾਪ ਕੀ ਸੁਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: doojai maae baap kee sudh |
lines.english: second, he learns of his mother and father;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਮਨਿ ਮਾਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amar padaarath naanakaa man maaniai sukh hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, He is everlasting wealth. Place your mind's faith in Him, and you shall find peace. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਜਵੈ ਖਾਣ ਪੀਅਣ ਕੀ ਧਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: panjavai khaan peean kee dhaat |
lines.english: Fifth, he runs after food and drink;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੈ ਪਿਆਰਿ ਉਪੰਨੀ ਖੇਡ ॥
lines.translit: chauthai piaar upanee khedd |
lines.english: fourth, the love of play awakens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਜੈ ਭਯਾ ਭਾਭੀ ਬੇਬ ॥
lines.translit: teejai bhayaa bhaabhee beb |
lines.english: third, his brothers, sisters-in-law and sisters;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਵੈ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਹੋਆ ਤਨ ਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthavai krodh hoaa tan naas |
lines.english: eighth, he becomes angry, and his body is consumed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਵੈ ਸੰਜਿ ਕੀਆ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satavai sanj keea ghar vaas |
lines.english: Seventh, he gathers wealth and dwells in his house;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵੈ ਧਉਲੇ ਉਭੇ ਸਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: naavai dhaule ubhe saah |
lines.english: Ninth, he turns grey, and his breathing becomes labored;

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਵੈ ਕਾਮੁ ਨ ਪੁਛੈ ਜਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhivai kaam na puchhai jaat |
lines.english: sixth, in his sexual desire, he does not respect social customs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਡਿਆ ਹੰਸੁ ਦਸਾਏ ਰਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: auddiaa hans dasaae raah |
lines.english: The swan of the soul takes flight, and asks which way to go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਵੈ ਦਧਾ ਹੋਆ ਸੁਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: dasavai dadhaa hoaa suaah |
lines.english: tenth, he is cremated, and turns to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਏ ਸਿਗੀਤ ਪੁਕਾਰੀ ਧਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: ge sigeet pukaaree dhaah |
lines.english: His companions send him off, crying out and lamenting.
